## Source: amazon-inspector (e5827ccd19d073818da31059d76a725b171d1fc793a4f2591ed0118a35b46c35)
The package pdfjs-dist-v5 was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (ea3eea654406297d9c58cb235af1e0ff5095edde635d85444f41f9189cd2e88f)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'pdfjs-dist-v5' @ 100.25.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
